steps.t: The urns Rauniel seeks can be found in the hills of eastern Rath Dúath and from outside the barrows of Gorthad Nûr. You should retrieve the urns for R…
Vessels for the water of the urns can be found upon the bridge to Eithel Gwaur in Rath Dúath. You should pour water into the vessels for Rauniel.
Rauniel can be found by the bridge to Eithel Gwaur in Rath Dúath. You should talk to Rauniel.
